description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a broad, curved steel blade and a wooden handle. The blade is dark gray, featuring a wide cutting edge and a slightly bearded lower section, giving it a traditional yet robust appearance. The handle is cylindrical, straight, and appears to be made of dark wood with lighter bands or grip sections spaced along its length for improved handling. The top of the handle is fitted securely into the axe head, with no visible fasteners, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing a natural grain and the blade having a slightly rough, forged texture. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the blade or the handle.
description: A traditional single-bladed axe with a broad, curved steel blade and a straight, banded wooden handle. The finish is matte with visible wood grain and a forged blade texture.
description_view_0: The axe is shown at an angle, highlighting the broad, curved blade and the full length of the straight, banded wooden handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the axe is visible, displaying the full blade curve and the handle's banded grip sections.
description_view_3: The axe is again viewed edge-on from the opposite side, emphasizing the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible grip bands, matte finish, and a round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, curved steel blade with a bearded lower edge and a wide cutting profile, no visible decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the top of the handle.
